rulings.Case Title: GARY TSIFRIN ET AL VS. IAN DUGGAN ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Dismiss Or In The Alternative Stay Petition To Confirm Arbitration
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for May 31, 2018 line 1. RESPONDENTs IAN DUGGAN and DAPHNE WONG's Motion To Dismiss Or In The Alternative Stay Petition To Confirm Arbitration continued to June 21, 2018. Moving party failed to provide curtesy copies. (Super. Ct. San Francisco County, Local Rules, rule 2.7.) Moving party shall provide curtesy copies by June 8, 2018 with a cover sheet indicating the new hearing date. = (501/REQ)
